feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business One
feed.subtitle: SAP Business One Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: list of default reports for user
entry.content:
Hello,

Where can I find the information about user defaults PLD reports?

I have SAP HANA 10 FP2108 version

 

Thank you in advance,

Marina Levy

entry.title: Numeración en certificado de retención
entry.content:
Buenos dias estimados expertos,

tengo una duda con respecto a los certificados de retencion (Carta Certificada) que emite SAP B1 cuando se efectura el pago de una factura de proveedor que aplica retencion, en nuestro pais este certificado debe llevar un numero, similar a una factura que lleva un numero unico, revisando en el area donde se crean las series de numeracion de todos los documentos veo que no esta el apartado para los certificados de retencion, de que otra manera se le puede asignar una numeracion a esos certificados?

 

De antemano agradezco su apoyo,

 

Saludos Cordiales

entry.title: Incorrect Cost (FIFO) When Returning
entry.content:
Hi Community,

After posting an A/P Credit Memo, a user noticed that the cost attributed to the item in the Journal Entry was incorrect.

As the current cost at that time was 0.02720 (and still is), why was the returning cost posted as 0.03000? 

This item was stocked under a single FIFO layer, costed at the same 0.02720, so I see no reason for attributing a different value.

If I simulate the very same transaction now, I get the same result. See first the actual cost, and then the amount being posted as cost on the second.

However, if I increase the quantity to 100, the cost gets a correct attribution: 100 x 0.02720 = 2.72

Would be this a rounding matter (issue)? Any thoughts would be greatly appreciated!

Best Regards,
Felipe

entry.title: How to Suspend/Pause Asset Depreciation in SAP B1
entry.content:
My client wants to suspend/pause the depreciation some of its equipment/facility since it is not used in production.

The Fixed Asset Depreciation Type is a Straight Line Method. I am looking for a workaround for this kind of requirement.

entry.title: Withholding Tax on USA/Puerto RIco localization
entry.content:
Good evening everyone, i come to you with a question:

Does a database on USA/Puerto Rico localization allows for using withholding taxes? If so, could you provide with a SAP note that says if it is (or rather isn't) possible?

#SapBusinessOne

entry.title: API CostCenter reference
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

 

May I ask if there is API reference for Costcenter, we are using SAP b1 v10.0. I just seeing Costcentertypes.

I want to create costcenter using Postman API but i don't find if there is the service layer reference for that.

 

Service layer reference

 

SAP b1 cost center Setup

 

 

 

 

 

Thank you in Advanced.

entry.title: SDK SAP B1 WITH DEVEXPRESS
entry.content:
Dear everyone,
I want make form sap can integrate with devexpress. It same boyumit can implement it.
Please share me any solotion or code example it.

Have nice day

@ANKIT_CHAUHAN 
SAP Business One 

SAP Business One Extensibility

entry.title: open balance sheet pdf or preview layouts error
entry.content:
When I open the balance sheet and want to view the pdf or preview the layout, it prompts me with an error, like in the picture.And I get errors when I choose to edit.
I upgraded the sapb1 version from 10.00.120 to 10.00.250 a few days ago, and I found that the previous version can open pdf normally, so I suspect that the crystal report version also needs to be upgraded. I then upgraded the crystal report version to SP2022 as well, but the same problem remained. Finally, I found that all the PDFS about finance could not be opened, and the PDFS of sales orders and purchase orders could be opened normally. What is the reason and how to solve it?

entry.title: Widgets in SAP Business One HANA retrieves information from another database
entry.content: Hello Experts, I currently have a database A that was exported and then imported or restored as a database B. When viewing the KPIs, dashboards, or any widget in database B, information from database A appears, which is not accurate. It seems that database B is linked to the information from database A. It seems there was an error in the export and restore process. How can I resolve this issue given that both databases are in production?

entry.title: Update B1 Production Order stage via Service Layer
entry.content:
Hello,

How can I update a production order item or stage status via B1 Service Layer PATCH command?

I can add new production order items and stages but have no way to update (PATCH) an item or stage status via REST commands.

It seems the WOR1.Status / WOR3.Status fields are not available in JSON result when I read a Production Order via standard REST command:

GET https://localhost:50000/b1s/v1/ProductionOrders(1)

Please help!

entry.title: ZUGFeRD import to SAP Business One
entry.content:
Dear all, I have downloaded the latest EFM Format for ZUGFeRD with SAP Business One and I have imported the Format to SAP Business One 10.0 FP2105 with Electronic File Manager.

I have added the XPaths and Namespaces, which are mentioned in SAP Help Portal. 

But on the end, I am not able to import the ZUGFeRD XML file into SAP Business One. I am getting the error message: 

[Microsoft][ODBC Driver 17 for SQL Server][SQL Server]The data types ntext and ntext are incompatible in the equal to operator. (OCRD)

Does someone get this error message at ZUGFeRD-Import before and was able to solve?

entry.title: inquiry about adding a desired format to the UI template configuration
entry.content:
Dear SAP

I hope this message finds you well. I am reaching out to inquire about the possibility of adding a specific format to the UI template configuration. [Journal voucher entry]

Unfortunately, the current options do not include the format I need, and I was wondering if there is a way to incorporate it.

If there are any steps I can follow or additional resources available to address this, I would greatly appreciate your guidance. Thank you in advance for your support.

Best regards,

entry.title: Fiori-Style Analytics Dashboard: 'Invalid Username/Password' Error for Non-Manager Users
entry.content:
After logging into SAP Business One, our system automatically loads the Fiori-style Analytics dashboard (Pervasive Analytics). While the Manager user has no issues accessing the dashboard, other users consistently receive an "Invalid Username/Password" error when the dashboard loads.

Details:

  • SAP Business One Version: Sap Business One 10 FP 2502
  • Database: SAP HANA (SLD connection user is SYSTEM)  - version Hana 2.00.059
  • Issue: After successful login to SAP Business One, the Fiori-style dashboard attempts to load and fails for non-manager users with the error "Invalid Username/Password".
  • Manager User: Works perfectly without any errors.
  • Other Users: Despite having the required permissions for analytics, they are facing authentication issues only with the dashboard.

What I've Checked/Done:

  • User Permissions: Verified that all affected users have the necessary authorizations for Analytics and Pervasive Analytics.
  • SLD & Database Connection: Confirmed that the SLD database connection user is SYSTEM, which has all required privileges.

My Questions:

  1. What could cause the "Invalid Username/Password" error for non-manager users when accessing the Fiori-style dashboard, given that the Manager user works fine??
  2. Are there any known configuration settings or workarounds for ensuring that all users benefit from the SYSTEM user's privileges (like PAL_ROLE and AFL execution rights) when accessing Analytics?

entry.title: Restore BP Account Balance permission
entry.content:
Hi All

Please help advise where to grant permission for SAP User to Restore BP Account Balances?

 

 

Kedalene Chong

entry.title: Service Layer API filter - operator 'like' does not work properly
entry.content:
Hi,

i am encountering a Problem in SAP-BusinessOne 10 FP2502

The like-Expression does not work.

I think this is a bug.

kind Regards,
Matthias Lakämper

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 

GET {{SboServicelayerHost}}Orders?$select=CardCode,DocNum,CardName&$filter=CardName like '002%'
Content-Type: application/json
Cookie: : {{SboServicelayerSessionId}}
Cache-Control: no-cache
Accept: application/json
###
 
{ "error": { "code": "201", "details": [ { "code": "", "message": "" } ], "message": "Query string error - Invalid filter condition" } }

entry.title: SAP B1: carriers
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

We would like to assign carriers/shippers in purchase orders and sales orders in SAP Business One. Currently, we are using the shipping type, but based on our research, this does not seem to be the standard approach.

So, my questions are:

  • Where are carriers/shippers typically stored in SAP Business One?

  • Is there a standard way to link them to transactions?

  • What are the best practices for managing the shipping process efficiently?

Looking forward to your insights!

entry.title: List of Cost Centers creation
entry.content:
Hi All

How to quickly create a long list of Cost Accounting Dimensional Cost Centers?

 

 

 

Kedalene Chong

entry.title: Issue in Inventory Counting Screen SAP B1
entry.content:
Dear team,

We are currently facing an issue in the inventory counting screen for a few items. As of now, I am sharing an example of one item for your reference:

  • Item Code: 10015
  • Inventory Counting Screen shows: 8856.2500 qty
  • Inventory Audit Report shows: 28956.25 qty
  • Inventory Counting Screen Count date and inventory audit report date : 31/03/2025

Please do the needful on it.

 

Regards,

Nikunj

entry.content:
Dears,

During Configuration SBO Mailer and Test connection

The problem in the below image appeared

Please, advise

Many thanks

entry.title: Inventory audit report and trail balance amount miss mismatch
entry.content:
Hi All,
There is missmatch for some accounts balance in Inventory Audit Report and Trail Balance , In SAP B1, what can be the possible reason behind this miss match ?

For example as on 31/12/2024

1040080 - Raw Materials - is showing  17,11,57,815.03 amount in Trail Balance and showing  17,17,79,934.85  as per Inventory Audit Report.

Need guidance for investigating it.
